TABLE.NAME: local_dixeo_course_ai
TABLE.COMMENT: Stores AI file sync configuration and status per course

FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key to course.id

FIELD.NAME: enabled
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether AI file sync is enabled for this course

FIELD.NAME: syncstatus
FIELD.COMMENT: Sync status: none, syncing, synchronized, error, paused

FIELD.NAME: filestotal
FIELD.COMMENT: Total number of files to sync

FIELD.NAME: filescompleted
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of files successfully synced

FIELD.NAME: progresspercent
FIELD.COMMENT: Sync progress percentage 0-100

FIELD.NAME: uploadbytes
FIELD.COMMENT: Bytes uploaded in current outbound HTTP sync (multipart body)

FIELD.NAME: uploadbytestotal
FIELD.COMMENT: Estimated total bytes for current outbound HTTP sync

FIELD.NAME: errormessage
FIELD.COMMENT: Last error message if status is error

FIELD.NAME: errorcount
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of consecutive errors for retry backoff

FIELD.NAME: lasterrorat
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp of last error

FIELD.NAME: filehash
FIELD.COMMENT: SHA-256 hash of sorted file manifest (contenthash+filename). Used to skip sync when files have not changed.

FIELD.NAME: lastsyncstarted
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp when last sync started

FIELD.NAME: lastsynccompleted
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp when last sync completed successfully

FIELD.NAME: enabledby
FIELD.COMMENT: User ID who enabled sync

FIELD.NAME: enabledat
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp when sync was enabled

FIELD.NAME: disabledby
FIELD.COMMENT: User ID who disabled sync

FIELD.NAME: disabledat
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp when sync was disabled

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp when record was created

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp when record was last modified

INDEX.NAME: idx_syncstatus
INDEX.COMMENT: Index for filtering by sync status

TABLE.NAME: local_dixeo_jobs
TABLE.COMMENT: Local binding between remote Dixeo job IDs and Moodle course/user

FIELD.NAME: jobid
FIELD.COMMENT: Remote Dixeo job UUID

FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: Moodle course ID (0 when unknown / pre-course)

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: User who initiated the job

FIELD.NAME: namespace
FIELD.COMMENT: Dixeo API namespace

FIELD.NAME: operation
FIELD.COMMENT: Logical operation type

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp when the binding was created

FIELD.NAME: objectid
FIELD.COMMENT: Course or section id for structure jobs

FIELD.NAME: placeholderid
FIELD.COMMENT: UUID for shortcode images; null for modal-only

FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: File location; structure jobs store 0

FIELD.NAME: component
FIELD.COMMENT: File location; structure jobs store empty string

FIELD.NAME: filearea
FIELD.COMMENT: File location; structure jobs store empty string

FIELD.NAME: itemid
FIELD.COMMENT: File location; structure jobs store 0

FIELD.NAME: filepath
FIELD.COMMENT: File location; structure jobs store /

FIELD.NAME: filename
FIELD.COMMENT: File location; structure jobs store empty string
